ingredients_text: 51% Burrito Sauce (Water, Chopped Tomatoes (Tomatoes, Tomato Juice), Tomato, Onion, Haricot Beans, Borlotti Beans, Sweetcorn, Garlic, Tomato Purée, Sugar, Chicken Stock (Water, Natural Chicken Flavourings, Salt, Sugar, Cornflour), Rapeseed Oil, Smoked Paprika, Lime Juice, Vinegar Blend (Spirit Vinegar, Distilled Malt Barley Vinegar, Water), Modified Maize Starch, Salt, Caramelised Sugar Syrup, Oregano, Garlic Powder, Onion Powder, Parsley, Black Pepper), 24% Cooked Rice Mix (Water, Long Grain Rice, Red Peppers, Green Peppers, Garlic Purée, Smoked Paprika, Ground Turmeric, Chilli Powder), 20% Cooked Chicken Breast (99% Chicken Breast, Cornflour), 4% Mature Cheddar Cheese (Milk).
